setwdir_ask: <Enter the absolute path for your new working directory:>
psetpath_ask:
<Current path is> {path}.
<Enter the new path for the .pygnore file, or 'exit' if the current path is already valid:>
pgetpath_error: [yellow]<Error while trying to access the .pygnore file:>[/yellow] {e}
paddexclude_ask_type: <What type of item do you want to add to excludes? 'fi' for file and 'fo' for folder:>
paddexclude_ask_pattern: <What pattern do you want to exclude? If not an exact name, add a wildcard before or after (e.g. *.log):>
paddexclude_success: [green]<Pattern successfully added to the exclude list.>[/green]
paddexclude_error: [yellow]<Error while adding the pattern to the exclude list:>[/yellow] {e}
paddinclude_ask_type: <What type of item do you want to add to includes? 'fi' for file and 'fo' for folder:>
paddinclude_ask_pattern: <What pattern do you want to include? If not an exact name, add a wildcard before or after (e.g. *.py):>
paddinclude_success: [green]<Pattern successfully added to the include list.>[/green]
paddinclude_error: [yellow]<Error while adding the pattern to the include list:>[/yellow] {e}
pdelexclude_ask_type: <What is the type of the exclude to remove? `fi` or `fo`:>
pdelexclude_ask_pattern: <What is the pattern of the exclude to remove from .pygnore?>
pdelinclude_ask_type: <What is the type of the include to remove? `fi` or `fo`:>
pdelinclude_ask_pattern: <What is the pattern of the include to remove from .pygnore?>
pneedtoinclude_ask_name: <What is the name of your file?>
pneedtoinclude_yes: [green]<This file would be included in the save.>[/green]
pneedtoinclude_no: [yellow]<This file would not be included in the save.>[/yellow]

dryrun_missing_config: [bold red]<Error:>[/bold red] <Missing configuration. Use `setdir` and `setwdir` to define paths.>
restore_ask_dest: <Please provide the location where you want the save to be restored:>
restore_ask_from_current: <Do you want to restore from the latest save?>
restore_integrity_fail: [red]<Restore completed but errors were found during the integrity check.>[/red]
setlang_error: [red]<Error,>[/red][bold] <selected language is not available, falling back to English>[/bold]

doc_paddinclude: <Add a pattern to the include list>
doc_pdelexclude: <Remove a pattern from the exclude list>
